titleStmt.title: SII 23.303: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 303. (A.R. No. 303 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same wall Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa II: year 7+1: 1141-42 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription begins with a short introduction with the words Pūmēvi vaḷar. It registers the sale of 12 vēli and 8 mā of lands, said to have been classified into four different grades (according to yield) in the 4th year of Vikrama-Chōḷa, by the mahāsabhā of Kulōttuṅgaśōḻamaṅgalam separated from the brahmadēya village Kēraḷāntakachaturvēdimaṅgalam, to one Vāmaṉaṉ Anbarkkaraiśu alias Tirunaṟaiyurnāṭṭukkōṉ of Taṇḍattōṭṭam who was to pay the dēvarkaḍamai to the temple and antarāyam of 778 kalam and odd of paddy and 21 and odd kāśu respectively. The reason for the sale seems to be that the lands became fallow by neglect on account of the sabha's inability to cultivate them and consequently arrears of the rent due to the temple had accumulated.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmevi vaḷara tirupoṉmārvu puṇara nāmevu kalaimakaḷ nalamperituciṟappa vijayamāmakaḷ velpuyattiruppa Icaiyum cevviyum Eṇṭicai viḷaṅka nirupar vantiṟaiñca niṇilamaṭantaiyai tirumaṇam puṇarantu cirvaḷar tarumam Aṇimuṭikavitteṉa maṇimuṭi cūṭi mallaiñālattup palluyiṟkellām Ellaiyi liṉpa miyalviṉil Eytac cempoṉvirasiṁhāsanattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruṉ
taruḷiya korājagesarīpanmarāna tribhuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu Uṭai yār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyilil śrīmāheśvararkkum śrīkāriyañceyvārkaḷukkum tevarkanmi karaṇattāṉukkum Ittevar tevatāṉam Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmadeyam keraḷāntakac caruppetimaṅkalattu veṟupiṟinta kulottuṅkacoḻa maṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyām
kuṭutta paricāvatu Eṅkaḷūr śrīvikkiramacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu nālāvatu nāṅkaḷum meṉkoṇṭacoḻa brahmamārāyar kaṇkāṇi paṭiyum taramiṭṭut taṭi maṭakki yiṟuttuvaru Eḻāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu nāṅkaḷ taṇṭṭatoṭṭamuṭaiyāṉ vāmanaṉ Aṉparkaraicāna tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭukoṉukku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷūril caṇṭeśvaravatikku meṟku lokamātevivāykkālukku vaṭakku Ivaṉukku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukuṭutta nilam pa
nniraṇṭe Eṭṭumā Innilam panniraṇṭe Eṭṭumāvum mahāsabhaiyār muṉpiṭṭa tarappottakappaṭi pattāmtaram nilam muṉṟemukkāl le nālumākkāṇi Araikkāṇi muṉtirikaikkiḻarai Innila muṉṟe mukkālle nālumākkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiyum 10 1- n taram nilam Aiñce Āṟumāviṉ kiḻaraiyum paṉṉiraṇṭām taram nilam Iraṇṭemukkāle nālumāmukkāṇi muntirikai kiḻaraiyum patiṉmuṉ ṟāntaram
nilam Irumāvaraiyum Āka nilam paṉṉiraṇṭe Eṭṭumāvināl pala taramaṭakki nilam nālumā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇikkiḻaraiyināl maṭakku Orumāvukku nellu ṉūṟṟu Aimpatteṇkalane Irutūṇippatakku nānāḻiyum Antarāyamaṭakku mānilam Orumāvukku kācu nāla Āṟu māvāka vanta kācu Irupattu Oṉṟeiraṇṭu nellu Eḻuṉūṟṟu Eḻupattu Eṇkalane tūṇippatakkum Innilam paṉniraṇ
ṭe Eṭṭumāvukku veli viḻukkāṭu veli Oṉṟukku Ūrkkālāl nellu Aṟupattirukalane Irutūṇikkuṟuṇi nānāḻi Ākavum veli Oṉṟukku An=tarāyakkācu Oṉṟaraiyenālumāvāka van=ta kācum nellum In nilam muṉpilāṇṭukaḷ payir ceyya Oṇṇātup puḻukivantamai yālum Eṅkaḷḷūril Innilam kaḷaippaṟuttu payirceyya Oṇṇāmai yālum Innilam pāḻkiṭakkilum ṅkaḷukku tevarkaṭamaiyum Anta rāyamum Iṟukka veṇṭukaiyālum Ittaṇṭatoṭṭamuṭaiyā
ṉ vāmaṉaṉ Aṉparkkaraicāna tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭukoṉukku kāṇi yāka viṟṟukkuṭuttu Innellum kācum Ittaratte Iṟukkakaṭavatāka vum Eṅkaḷūr taramaḻintu taramiṭilum Innilattukku Ittaramallatu maṟṟu taramiṭakkaṭavomallātomākavum Iṉnilam Ivaṉ tāṉ veṇṭum payiṟ ceytu Ittaravokariyāl van=ta kaṭamai kuṭimai Inta maṭakku māvile can=tirātittaval Aṉupavittu Iṟukkakaṭa vaṉṉākavum Ippaṭiyallatu maṟṟu Epperpaṭṭutum kaṭavarallātā nākavum Ippaṭikku Uṭaiyār
tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyilile śrīmāyeśvararkkum śrīkāriyam ceyvārkaḷukkum tevarkaṉmi karaṇattāṉukkum Aṟiya kalveṭṭi koḷḷa peṟuvaṉnākavum Ippaṭi sammatittu Icaivutiṭṭu kuṭuttom taṇṭattoṭṭamuṭaiyāṉ vāmaṉaṉ Aṉparkkaracāna tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭukoṉukku mahā sabheyom Eṅkaḷūr taramaḻiñcu taramiṭilum taramiṭāte parappale Iṟukkilum Eṅkaḷūr Aṭaṅka tevarkku Aḷakkakaṭava nellum An=tarāyakkācum Ittiṭṭiṉpaṭi Ūrkkālāl ne
llu Eḻunūṟṟu Eḻupattu Eṅkalane tūṇippatakkum kācu Irupattu Oṉṟe Iraṇṭumāvum pokki nikki niṉṟa nellum kācum niṉṟa niṟai nilattile Īṟu Iṟukkakaṭavomāka sammatittu Icaivutiṭṭu kuṭuttu Ittiṭṭuppaṭi Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyi lile kalluveṭṭikkoḷḷa peṟuvanāka Ippaṭi sammatittu Icaivutiṭṭu kuṭuttom taṇṭatoṭṭamuṭaiyāṉ vāmanaṉ Aṉpar karaicāna tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭukoṉukku mahāsabhaiyom In nilam Ittarappaṭi Allatu veṟupiṟitu ninaippār tiruvā
kuruviraiyākali Ivarkaḷ paṇiyāl In=ta Icaivutiṭṭu kuṭutteṉ Amaṇkuṭaiyāṉ tirumaḻavāṭi Uṭaiyāṉ Āṇṭapiḷḷaiyeṉ Ivai Eṉneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai māṅkaḷūr ceṭṭaiyapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Erutukkuṭi tiruveṇkāṭupaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭik kivai Ācūri Āṭavallān neḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai Erutuṇṭi tiruveṇkāṭupaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai Ācūri kecavapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai Irāyūr tillaināyaka
n Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai Āsūri ceṭṭayapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Itu poṟ kumārapaṭṭan sayiñaiyātanmaikku Erutuṇṭi tāmotirapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Itu Erutuṇṭi ceṭṭaipaṭṭan sayiñaiyātanmaikku Ācūri Aṇṭanāyakapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaṇṭaṉūr Uṭai yān periyān maturāntakatevaneṉ Ivai kumpirānpaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ācūri nampik kaṇṇappaṭṭan māsabhaiyār Eḻut tiṭṭatu Ivarkaḷ paṇikka Amaṇkuṭaiyān Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.303 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
